ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customer's company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the customer's company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the customer's company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the customer's company */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the customer (e.g., referral, online form, phone call) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive, potential) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact person */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the contact belongs to */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call, meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of interaction (e.g., email, phone, in-person, chat) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date and time for the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main objective of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channels used for the campaign (e.g., email, social media, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the customer participated in */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who participated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of participation (e.g., engaged, not engaged) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the level of engagement */,
  "conversion_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the participant converted (e.g., made a purchase, signed up for a service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the customer */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., email, survey, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., campaign, feedback, system) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or feature where the action was performed (e.g., customers, campaigns, feedback) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
